kirundi.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Igipimo cyo guhindura = igipimo kingana na 1 (urugero, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Kugwiza nacyo bihindura urugero bitabanje guhindura agaciro. Imbanziriza za SI (kilo, milli) ni imbaraga za 10 — gusa imura akadomo ka decimal.
kirundi.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Uburebure, ubwinshi, ingano, ubushyuhe, igihe, ingufu, umuvundo. Itegeko rimwe rukoze: kurikirana ingero kuri buri ntambwe. Niba igisubizo cyawe cya nyuma kiri muri m² mu gihe washakaga amasegonda, wakoze ikosa ahantu hejuru.
kirundi.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Ihinduka rya buri munsi (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) hamwe n'ibipimo bya AP / SAT / laboratwari. Buri kibazo cyerekana igipimo cyo guhindura nyuma yo gusubiza kugira ngo wubake kwibuka kw'imitsi.
kirundi.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Ibihe nyabyo byo guhindura ingero: ikoreshwa ry'amavuta, guhindura ingano y'amafunguro, kubara ingano y'imiti, kugereranya intera y'urugendo. Ibibazo by'amagambo ni 80% gusobanukirwa ibyasomwe + 20% imibare yo guhindura.
kirundi.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: Buri mbanziriza ya SI ni imbaraga ya 10. Imura imbaraga z'inkomoko n'intego kugira ngo wumve uburyo ingero zitandukanye koko — ubuhanga bw'ibanze buri inyuma y'inyandiko ya siyansi n'igereranya rya Fermi.
kirundi.test_your_unit_conversion_knowledge: Gerageza ubumenyi bwawe bwo guhindura ingero!
kirundi.question: 🧠 Ikibazo
kirundi.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Kanda Kora kugira ngo ubone ikibazo cy'amagambo cyakozwe na AI
kirundi.2_orders_of_magnitude_close_cousins_cm: <2 urwego rw'ubunini — bene wabo ba hafi (cm→m).
kirundi.5_8_oom_biology_to_geology_scales: 5-8 OOM — ingero kuva muri biyoloji kugeza muri geoloji.
kirundi.9_12_oom_micro_to_macro_span: 9-12 OOM — kuva ku micro kugeza ku macro.
kirundi.13_oom_atomic_to_cosmic: 13+ OOM — kuva kuri atome kugeza ku isanzure.
kirundi.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Hindura imbaraga z'inkomoko n'intego (10^N). Igikoresho gishyira impinduka y'ubunini mu byiciro 5 bitandukanye. Nta manota, nta kwerekana.
kirundi.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Igitekerezo: Ni izihe ngero z'isi nyayo zikubiyemo buri cyiciro cy'ubunini?
kirundi.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Gereranya cm→km, mm→umwaka w'umucyo. Buri kimwe OOM zingahe?
kirundi.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Kuki abahanga mu bya siyansi batozwa mu rwego rw'ubunini?
kirundi.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Sobanura impamvu gutekereza ku ngano kuri OOM nyinshi bigoye.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cy'ubunini gitandukanye cy'imimerere 5; nta manota y'amakosa; nta kwerekana — ku bushake.
kirundi.metric_prefixes_powers_of_10_from_atom: 🔬 Imbanziriza za Metero — Imbaraga za 10 kuva kuri atome kugeza ku nzira y'amata
